articles.title: Solana sets records for monthly new and active addresses amid price rally
articles.description: Saga phones are still selling for thousands on eBay as Solana breezes past $100, nearly a year after being under $10.

articles.title: Raydium’s RAY Token Surges 95% in a Week, Accompanying a 47.41% TVL Boost to $126.79M on the Solana DEX
articles.description: Raydium, established on the Solana blockchain, functions as an automated market maker (AMM) and liquidity provider, playing a crucial role in the Solana ecosystem’s decentralized finance (DeFi) applications. Distinct from traditional exchanges, Raydium employs liquidity pools rather than an order book for asset trading, enabling swifter and more cost-effective transactions. The platform’s...

articles.title: The Next FTX? MEXC Crypto Exchange Comes Under Fire For ‘Shady’ Activities
articles.description: Seychelles-based crypto exchange MEXC has come under fire for allegedly locking users out of their accounts and seizing their funds. These actions, which the exchange claims were motivated by abnormal trading activities, have sparked concerns from the crypto community. Many users have flocked to social media platform X in recent days to accuse MEXC of […]

articles.title: Solana Surges Past $110, Surpassing BNB as Fourth largest Crypto
articles.description: Solana surpasses Binance Coin as the fourth-largest crypto by market value, with a 51.8% surge in just one week.

articles.title: Solana hits $115 for the first time in a year
articles.description: More traders are now betting on the further rise in Solana's price after its recent uptrend.

articles.title: Veteran Trader Peter Brandt Withdraws Bearish Outlook on Ethereum, Says Solana Can Continue Trending Higher
articles.description: Seasoned trader Peter Brandt says he’s no longer expecting the leading altcoin Ethereum (ETH) go on a big move to the downside. Last week, Brandt told his 707,300 followers on the social media platform X that he was shorting Ethereum, predicting that ETH could tumble to as low as $650. In an update, the veteran […]

articles.title: Solana (SOL) Flips BNB to Become Fourth Biggest Coin
articles.description: Solana (SOL) has ascended to become fourth largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization

articles.title: Solana Surges Above $117 As Meme Coin Craze Extends Market Momentum
articles.description: The native cryptocurrency of Solana continued a spectacular climb that has already lasted three weeks by breaking beyond the $110 mark on Sunday morning. This is a strong demonstration of resilience. The price of SOL has surged, reaching a level not seen since the night before Terra collapsed a year and a half ago. This coincides with a substantial uptick in meme coin activity in the...

articles.title: Solana Decentralized Exchange Altcoin Skyrockets More Than 95% This Week Amid Roaring Network Growth
articles.description: The native token for a decentralized exchange (DEX) built on Solana (SOL) has skyrocketed by more than 95% this week amid roaring network growth. Raydium (RAY) is an on-chain order book automated market maker (AMM). The project’s native token, RAY, is trading at $1.72 at time of writing, up from around $0.88 one week ago. […]
